meta.homeDescription: Bangkok-first marketplace for verified public sale and rent listings, condominium projects, and transparent connections for buyers, tenants, owners, agencies, and developers.
meta.propertiesDescription: Filter verified Thailand property listings by city, district, developer, transit, price, and bedrooms.
meta.searchDescription: Search redirects to the canonical Properties results surface with shared filters for city, district, price, and bedrooms.
meta.aboutDescription: Learn about GoThailandHome, a Thailand property platform for international buyers, sellers, and renters.
meta.contactDescription: Contact GoThailandHome for property enquiries. Placeholder contact details for MVP.
meta.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for could not be found.
meta.citiesDescription: Explore Thailand property by city: Bangkok, Pattaya, Phuket, Chiang Mai, Rayong, and Hua Hin.
meta.developersDescription: Developer profiles, official websites, and published projects on GoThailandHome.
meta.findMyHomeDescription: Submit a private buyer or tenant brief. Your demand is never published publicly.
meta.listYourPropertyDescription: Submit an owner listing for platform review. Nothing is auto-published.
meta.developerPartnerDescription: Apply for a developer partnership. Applications stay pending until review.
meta.agencyPartnerDescription: Apply for an agency partnership. Applications stay pending until review.
meta.marketplaceDescription: Choose your marketplace path: Find My Home, List Your Property, partnerships, or request a viewing on a listing.
meta.knowledgeDescription: Alpha guides and controlled Bangkok glossary terms. No invented yields, awards, or testimonials.
meta.knowledgeArticlesDescription: Approved static knowledge articles with visible citations and verification dates.
meta.knowledgeGlossaryDescription: Controlled vocabulary names for transit, facilities, and property types — names only.
meta.knowledgeDistrictsDescription: Index of Bangkok’s 50 districts with links to District Center pages.
meta.blogDescription: Editorial blog posts, separated from evidence-backed knowledge references.
meta.leadSuccessDescription: Your marketplace lead was received. No automated CRM email was sent.
meta.leadErrorTitle: Request could not be completed | GoThailandHome
meta.leadErrorDescription: Something went wrong with this marketplace lead. You can try again or contact Platform Customer Success.
meta.buyDescription: Browse verified public Bangkok sale listings. GoThailandHome is a discovery marketplace, not the listing agent.
meta.rentDescription: Browse verified public Bangkok rent listings. GoThailandHome is a discovery marketplace, not the listing agent.
meta.favoritesDescription: View property listings saved on this device. Favorites are local-only and are not linked to an account.
meta.compareDescription: Compare property listings side by side on this device. Comparison selections are local-only and are not linked to an account.

projectLanding.listingsNote: Listing prices come from currently verified public source pages. They are not developer official project prices and may change when sources update.
projectLanding.listingsViewAll: View all listings for this project
projectLanding.listingsEmpty: No verified public listings are currently published for this project.
projectLanding.priceSummaryNote: Current published listing data only — not developer official pricing. Figures may change with source availability.
projectLanding.priceSummaryInsufficient: Not enough verified listings to show a price range for this project.
projectLanding.mapUnverified: Coordinates are not marked as verified for this project.
projectLanding.mapMissing: No verified map coordinates are on file.
projectLanding.leadSubtitle: Ask about sale or rental units at this project. UTM and click IDs are captured for future ads attribution.
projectLanding.success: Enquiry received. We will follow up soon.
projectLanding.adsNote: Conversion tracking placeholders are ready for Meta Pixel and Google Ads IDs.
projectLanding.nearbyMissing: No verified nearby places are on file.
projectLanding.similarNote: Matched by district or developer from published projects — not an investment comparison.
projectLanding.relatedEmpty: No related projects matched by shared district or developer on this platform.
projectLanding.developerDisclaimer: GoThailandHome does not represent this developer. Profiles summarize published project data.
projectLanding.findMyHomeBody: Tell us what you need. Platform Customer Success can help — Apple is Platform Customer Success only, never project sales staff.
projectLanding.contactOfficialMissing: No verified official project contact is on file.
projectLanding.contactPlatformNote: GoThailandHome Customer Success and AI Concierge assist with platform help only. Never project sales staff.

home.headline: Bangkok property discovery, built for clarity
home.subheadline: A Bangkok-first marketplace for verified public sale and rent listings, real condominium projects, and transparent connections between buyers, tenants, owners, agencies, and developers.
home.positioning: We index public listings and project data. GoThailandHome is not a brokerage — and Platform Customer Success is never your listing agent.
home.featuredSubtitle: Verified public listings from indexed sources.
home.featuredProjectsSubtitle: Published Bangkok projects from the Project Master.
home.latestListingsSubtitle: Newest verified public sale and rent units — prices and links come from source pages.
home.citiesSubtitle: Browse Bangkok districts with published inventory.
home.developersSubtitle: Developer profiles linked to published projects on this platform.
home.pathsTitle: Start with buy, rent, or a sale scan
home.pathsSubtitle: Pick a path, refine with search filters, then open projects, districts, or an enquiry.
home.investmentBody: Browse Bangkok sale inventory sorted from lowest published price for entry screening — not a yield forecast.
home.ctaBody: Send an enquiry about a city, project, or listing. No public login required.
home.whySubtitle: Marketplace discovery with verified facts — not invented claims.
home.whyVerifiedBody: Listings shown as verified carry source identity, price, and provenance checks from our import pipeline.
home.whyMultiBody: Inventory is indexed from multiple public portals, kept as independent source records without silent auto-merge.
home.whyTransparencyBody: Source links and update context stay visible wherever we have them. Missing media and missing contacts are labeled honestly.
home.whyMarketplaceBody: Buyers, tenants, owners, agencies, and developers can start from the same platform — without confusing us for the listing agent.
home.marketplaceSubtitle: Choose the path that matches your role.
home.knowledgeSubtitle: Alpha guides for how this marketplace works. No invented awards or testimonials.
home.knowledgeComing: More editorial guides will publish here. For now, start with how we operate.
home.guidePlatformBody: A Bangkok-first discovery marketplace for public listings and projects — not a brokerage.
home.guideVerifiedBody: Verified means source identity, price, and provenance checks — not a promise that we own the deal.
home.guideContactBody: Use a listing contact when present. Otherwise ask Platform Customer Success to help reach the source.
home.supportSubtitle: Platform Customer Success and AI concierge assistance only — never a listing agent substitute.
home.coverageNote: Coverage is Bangkok-first Wave inventory from verified import packages.

favorites.title: Saved listings
favorites.subtitle: Properties saved on this device. Open a card to review details or remove a save.
favorites.retentionNote: Favorites are stored only on this device. They are not linked to an account, not synced across devices, and are removed if you clear site data for this browser.
favorites.emptyBody: Save a listing from search results or a property page. Saves stay on this device only.
favorites.unavailableBody: These saved identifiers are missing or no longer published. Remove them or keep browsing.

compare.title: Compare listings
compare.subtitle: Compare selected properties side by side on this device. Values come from published source data — missing facts show as unknown, never zero.
compare.retentionNote: Comparison selections are stored only on this device. They are not linked to an account, not synced across devices, and are removed if you clear site data for this browser.
compare.selectedState: Added to comparison on this device
compare.fullState: Comparison is full — remove one to add another
compare.emptyBody: Add listings from search results or a property page. Selections stay on this device only.
compare.needMoreBody: Add at least {min} listings to see a side-by-side comparison.
compare.tableCaption: Side-by-side property comparison on approved fields
compare.unavailableBody: These selected identifiers are missing or no longer published. Remove them or keep browsing.

properties.title: Property listings
properties.subtitle: Verified public listings with filters for sale, rent, city, district, developer, transit, price, and bedrooms.
properties.trustBody: Listings come from multiple verified public sources. Prices reflect published source data and may change. Contact details differ by listing — GoThailandHome is a marketplace and discovery platform, not the listing agent.
properties.noResultsBody: Try clearing filters, widening budget or area, or browsing Bangkok buy and rent listings.
properties.queryErrorBody: We could not load results for this query. Try again or clear filters.
properties.platformHelp: Ask platform for help contacting the source

property.notFound: This property could not be found.
property.mapMissing: No verified map coordinates are on file for this listing or its project.
property.nearbyMissing: No verified nearby BTS/MRT or nearby places are on file.
property.contactPlatformNote: Platform Customer Success and AI Concierge help only. Never the listing owner or agent.
property.priceNotCurrent: Price is shown from the source record and is not marked current.
property.freshnessWarning: Verification is older — treat price and availability as historical.
property.freshnessExpired: Verification is too old to present as current.
property.freshnessUnknown: Verification date unavailable — facts are not marked current.

search.title: Search properties
search.subtitle: Filter verified public listings. Buy and rent search share the same URL state as Properties.

about.title: About GoThailandHome
about.subtitle: A Thailand property platform for Chinese and international audiences.
about.body1: GoThailandHome is being built as a practical destination for discovering homes across Thailand. This MVP uses placeholder listings and copy only.
about.body2: Future phases may add richer listing data, enquiry workflows, and market guides. There is no CMS, database, map, or AI integration in this release.
about.missionBody: Make Thailand property discovery clearer for English, Chinese, and Thai users.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Reach Platform Customer Success for help and escalation. Listing contacts appear on each property page when available.
contact.name: Name
contact.note: Platform support is separate from listing ownership. Apple is Platform Customer Success only.
contact.journeyBody: Buyers, owners, developers, agencies, and viewing requests start from the Marketplace hub — not this contact form.
contact.privacyNote: Messages sent here stay private. They are never published as listings or public content.

footer.tagline: Thailand property for buyers, sellers, and renters.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page may have moved, or the link is incorrect.

listings.districtHint: District options follow the selected city. Changing city clears a mismatched district.
listings.rangeInvalid: Minimum cannot be greater than maximum.

cities.title: Cities
cities.subtitle: Thailand property markets with district and project hubs.
cities.emptyProjects: No imported projects in this area yet.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.subtitle: Alpha guides and controlled vocabulary for Bangkok property discovery.
knowledge.notice: No invented awards, testimonials, rental yields, or price indices.
knowledge.articlesSubtitle: Approved reference articles with visible citations, verification dates, and clear locale fallback disclosure.
knowledge.articlesEmptyBody: Approved article inventory is currently empty for this locale set.
knowledge.fallbackBody: This article is shown in English because a complete translation for this language is not yet available.
knowledge.glossaryBody: Controlled term names used across transit tags, facilities, and property types.
knowledge.glossaryNotice: Names only — glossary entries are not property facts or investment advice.
knowledge.districtsBody: All 50 Bangkok districts with links to District Center pages.
knowledge.districtsNotice: Postal codes come from the glossary package. District Center pages add sourced amenities only when present.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Editorial posts are separated from evidence-backed reference guides.
blog.notice: Blog posts are editorial content and are not substitutes for official-source knowledge references.
blog.emptyBody: Approved blog inventory is currently empty.
blog.fallbackBody: This post is shown in English because a complete translation for this language is not yet available.

investmentGuide.title: Investment guide
investmentGuide.fallbackBody: This guide is shown in English because a complete translation for this language is not yet available.

legalGuide.title: Legal guide
legalGuide.fallbackBody: This guide is shown in English because a complete translation for this language is not yet available.

faqHub.title: FAQ
faqHub.subtitle: Platform and process questions with approved answers.
faqHub.notice: FAQ answers do not provide yield forecasts or personalized legal advice.

analytics.consentBody: We use privacy-safe analytics to measure discovery and lead intent after you opt in. No names, emails, or phone numbers are sent in analytics events.

leads.errorBody: We could not complete this request. Please try again.
leads.errorHint: Validation mistakes are shown on the form. This page is for shared lead errors. No CRM email was sent.
leads.modeStored: Accepted into lead storage when configured.
leads.modePlaceholder: Accepted as a platform placeholder reference. No CRM automation and no email were sent.

buyRent.buySubtitle: Verified public Bangkok sale listings from indexed sources.
buyRent.rentSubtitle: Verified public Bangkok rent listings from indexed sources.
buyRent.trustNote: GoThailandHome indexes public listings. We are not the listing agent.
buyRent.inventoryNote: Counts below are verified listings currently published on this platform — not a complete market census.

districtCenter.overviewNote: Administrative and package facts only. Market yields and invented averages are not shown.
districtCenter.inventoryNote: Project and listing counts below are platform inventory on GoThailandHome — not a market census.
districtCenter.mapNote: External map link when package coordinates are present. No embedded map product.
districtCenter.mapMissing: Verified coordinates are not available for this district package.
districtCenter.projectsNote: Published projects linked to this district on GoThailandHome. Preview is bounded — not a complete market inventory.
districtCenter.listingsNote: Verified public listings linked to this district. Preview only — not a complete market inventory.
districtCenter.transitNote: Sourced package transportation plus transit tags from linked projects. Empty stays unknown.
districtCenter.transitFromProjects: Transit tags from projects on this platform
districtCenter.transitMissing: No sourced BTS/MRT entries are on file for this district package.
districtCenter.lifestyleNote: Lifestyle editorial content is not fabricated for Alpha.
districtCenter.lifestyleMissing: No verified lifestyle profile is available for this district yet.
districtCenter.schoolsNote: Sourced package schools only. Empty amenity lists stay unknown — nothing is invented.
districtCenter.hospitalsNote: Sourced package hospitals only. Empty amenity lists stay unknown — nothing is invented.
districtCenter.shoppingNote: Sourced package shopping places only. Empty amenity lists stay unknown — nothing is invented.
districtCenter.amenitiesEmpty: No sourced entries are on file for this district package.
districtCenter.knowledgeNote: Package investment notes and cited sources only — no invented statistics.
districtCenter.knowledgeFallback: This district package does not include rental yields, price indices, or inventory statistics.
districtCenter.findMyHomeBody: Submit a private buyer or tenant brief. Your demand is never published as a public listing.

developers.title: Developers
developers.subtitle: Published developer profiles with projects and listings.
developers.listingsNote: Verified public listings linked to this developer’s projects on the platform. Not an official price list.
developers.listingsViewAll: View all listings for this developer
developers.listingsEmpty: No verified public listings are currently published for this developer.
developers.overviewNote: Official facts are marked separately from platform-linked project relationships. Missing values stay unavailable.
developers.companyNote: Company facts appear only when evidence allows. Missing values stay unavailable — nothing is invented.
developers.officialWebsiteNote: Shown only when the official website field is evidence-backed.
developers.websiteMissing: No verified official website is on file for this developer.
developers.verificationNote: Evidence labels come from the Developer Master matrix. Classifications are never upgraded on this page.
developers.logoStatusPlaceholder: Placeholder — official logo mark not presented
developers.logoStatusOfficialRemote: Official logo URL on file — local mirror not presented
developers.factoryLinkedNote: Counts and lists below come from factory-linked project packages on this platform — not an official company portfolio unless labelled Official.
developers.projectsDisclaimer: These are verified projects published on GoThailandHome for this developer. They do not claim to be the developer’s complete portfolio.
developers.portfolioSubsetNote: Platform subset only — not the developer’s complete portfolio.
developers.contactOfficialMissing: No verified official developer contact is on file.
developers.contactPartnershipBody: Claim or update this profile, or discuss cooperation. All requests stay pending until platform verification.
developers.contactPlatformNote: GoThailandHome Customer Success and AI Concierge assist with platform help only. Apple is Platform Customer Success — never developer sales staff.
developers.trustBody: GoThailandHome aggregates verified marketplace data. Developer profiles may combine official facts and platform-linked project or listing data. Availability changes when sources update. GoThailandHome does not claim official representation of a developer unless a verified partnership exists.
developers.relatedDevelopersEmpty: No related developers matched by shared Bangkok project districts on this platform.
developers.similarNote: Matched by overlapping Bangkok project districts on this platform — not a market-position or investment ranking.
developers.partnershipBody: Partnership, profile claims, and project submissions are subject to GoThailandHome verification before publish.

marketplace.hubSubtitle: Choose the path that matches your role. Browse stays separate from intake and partnerships.
marketplace.hubPromise: We index public listings; we are not the listing agent; Platform Customer Success can help contact the source when needed. Demand, owner, and partnership submissions stay private until reviewed — they are never presented as published inventory.
marketplace.viewingEntrySubtitle: Open any verified listing to request a viewing. Listing contact is used first when available.
marketplace.findSubtitle: Tell us what you need. Your request stays private — it is never published as a public listing.
marketplace.findPrivacyNote: Private demand lead only. We will not publish your requirements publicly.
marketplace.listSubtitle: Submit your property for platform review. Nothing is auto-published.
marketplace.listReviewNote: All owner submissions enter pending review. Listings are not auto-published.
marketplace.developerPartnerSubtitle: Apply to collaborate with GoThailandHome. Applications stay pending until platform review.
marketplace.agencyPartnerSubtitle: Apply as a licensed agency partner. Applications stay pending until platform review.
marketplace.partnerPendingNote: Applications remain pending until the GoThailandHome team reviews them.
marketplace.supportFormNote: This form reaches Platform Customer Success for help and escalation. It does not register Apple or platform staff as a listing owner.
marketplace.name: Name
marketplace.consent: I consent to GoThailandHome contacting me about this private request.
marketplace.authorization: I confirm I am the owner or an authorized agent for this property.
marketplace.successPrivate: Thank you. Your private Find My Home request was received and will not be published.
marketplace.successReview: Thank you. Your listing submission is pending platform review and will not auto-publish.
marketplace.successPending: Thank you. Your partnership application is pending platform review.
marketplace.successSupport: Thank you. Platform Customer Success received your message.
marketplace.successViewing: Thank you. Your viewing request was received.
marketplace.nextSteps: Platform Customer Success may follow up. This is not an automated CRM reply and no email was sent by this form.

errors.generic: We could not submit your request. Please check the form and try again.
errors.name_and_contact_required: Name and at least one of phone or email are required.
errors.company_contact_required: Company, representative, and a contact channel are required.
errors.agency_contact_required: Agency name, representative, and a contact channel are required.
errors.message_required: Name, email, and message are required.
errors.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.storage_unavailable: Lead storage is temporarily unavailable. Your request was accepted as a platform placeholder for review.

marketplace.listingContactMissing: No listing contact is on file for this property. Ask GoThailandHome for help reaching the source — platform staff are not the listing agent.
marketplace.platformSupportTitle: Ask GoThailandHome to help contact the source
marketplace.platformSupportNote: Platform assistance only. Apple and platform staff are never the listing owner, agent, agency, or developer contact.
marketplace.escalationCta: Ask GoThailandHome to help contact the source

aiConcierge.title: Ask for shortlist help
aiConcierge.note: Assistive suggestions only. The AI concierge is not a listing agent and never replaces Platform Customer Success or a verified listing contact.
